biography: Tomas, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, has graced the fairways representing Espoo Ringside Golf in past years. While Tomas is known for his jovial nature off the course, he is an intense competitor once he steps onto the tee box. He has appeared in the tournament three times.
Although Tomas has not yet captured the coveted Hector Trophée or the individual Victor Trophy, his dedication and sportsmanship have made him a beloved figure among players and spectators alike.
It is understood that Tomas has retired from Hector Trophée events. However, golf enthusiasts know that anything can happen, and a return to the competition cannot be entirely ruled out.
